title: Use of system functions in localparam value prevents resolution of port

features.name: localparam with system function in direct port range
features.description: Code should include a module port declaration with a vector range that directly uses a localparam whose value is defined by a system function call like $clog2, with the range in the form [N:0] or [N-1:0]

features.name: localparam with $clog2 in expression port range
features.description: Code should include a module port declaration with a vector range that uses a localparam in an arithmetic expression, where the localparam value is defined by a system function call like $clog2

features.name: localparam with plain constant in direct port range
features.description: Code should include a module port declaration with a vector range that directly uses a localparam whose value is a plain integer constant
